128 D0200F1_SELF_DPRCTN_CD D0200F1_SELF_DPRCTN_CD D0200F1 Resident Mood Interview - Self Depreciation Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is experiencing self-depreciation (feeling bad about themselves, that they are a failure, etc.). -=Not assessed/no information
0=No (enter 0 in column 2)
1=Yes (enter 0-3 in column 2)
9=No response (leave column 2
